convention: anthropics/skills/skill-creator evals.json — trigger-only fixture per references/schemas.md (per rf2-djprj). Each entry carries `should_trigger` so skill-creator's description-optimisation loop can score train/held-out trigger accuracy.
notes: Positives target live-runtime work on a running re-frame2 app (dispatch, app-db inspection, epoch walk, hot-swap, restore-epoch, source-coord click-to-line). Negatives target spec/design discussion, code authoring, greenfield, and retros (vocab-only hits without runtime).

evals.name: inspect-appdb
evals.prompt: What's in app-db under [:shopping-cart :items] right now?

evals.name: dispatch-event
evals.prompt: Dispatch [:cart/apply-coupon "SPRING25"] and tell me what changed.

evals.name: trace-cascade
evals.prompt: Trace the six dominoes for the last :profile/save dispatch.

evals.name: hot-swap-handler
evals.prompt: Hot-swap :cart/apply-coupon so it rejects expired coupons. Then dispatch with an expired code and confirm.

evals.name: walk-epochs
evals.prompt: Walk back through the last 5 epochs and tell me when :user/profile last changed.

evals.name: restore-epoch
evals.prompt: Restore the app to epoch 47 and re-fire :checkout/start so I can compare.

evals.name: watch-events
evals.prompt: Watch every :checkout/* event as I click through the funnel.

evals.name: click-to-source
evals.prompt: I clicked the Save button and nothing happened. Where is it in the source and why doesn't it work?

evals.name: neg-spec-discussion
evals.prompt: Why does re-frame2 use frames instead of a single global app-db?
evals.rationale: Spec / design rationale belongs to SKILL-REDIRECT.md.

evals.name: neg-author-from-scratch
evals.prompt: Write me a brand-new re-frame2 reg-event-fx for posting a login form.
evals.rationale: Authoring code without a running app is re-frame2.

evals.name: neg-greenfield
evals.prompt: Bootstrap a new re-frame2 project from an empty directory.

evals.name: neg-causa-tour
evals.prompt: Which Causa panel surfaces schema violations?
evals.rationale: Causa tour is its own skill.

evals.name: neg-retro-session
evals.prompt: Retro on the re-frame2-pair session I just finished.

evals.name: neg-improver-static
evals.prompt: Audit cart/events.cljs against re-frame2 best practices.
evals.rationale: Static critique with no runtime is re-frame2-improver.

evals.name: neg-migration
evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my re-frame v1 app to re-frame2.

evals.name: neg-vocab-only-pair
evals.prompt: Be my pair programmer for Python today.
evals.rationale: Vocabulary hit ('pair programmer') on a different language entirely.
